description_long: This is a tall, slender pint glass filled with a dark liquid, topped with a creamy, light-colored foam head. The front of the glass features a prominent gold harp logo and bold white text, both set against the deep black of the glass or liquid. The glass has a gently curved profile, wider at the top and bottom and slightly narrower in the middle, typical of a stout or porter beer glass. The foam head appears thick and smooth, contrasting sharply with the dark body below. The surface of the glass is glossy and reflective, with no visible condensation or droplets. The overall appearance is clean, iconic, and visually striking, suitable for a premium stout beer.
description: A glossy, black pint glass with a creamy foam head and gold harp logo, featuring bold white text on the front. The glass is tall, slender, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold harp logo and bold white text on the black glass, with the creamy foam head clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with only a partial glimpse of the logo and text, mostly showing the black surface and foam head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black surface of the glass and the foam head, with no visible logos or text.
description_view_3: Angled side view with a partial view of the logo and text, mostly showing the black glass and foam head.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a gold harp icon above bold, white serif text, set against a solid black background. The design is minimalistic and elegant, with a strong contrast between the gold, white, and black elements.
